analysis: Fleet Beta Squad 10 — Component Risk Scoring
methodology: Error rates from cron/runs/ last 7 days, watchdog state.json alerts, service log error frequency, consecutive error state

factors: 37672 'Address already in use' errors in mission-control.log (301k lines total)
Repeated OSError: [Errno 48] crash-restart loop on port 3000
No graceful port release — relies on process death to free socket
Currently up per watchdog, but fragile — any restart triggers cascade
[compiler] port 3000 is UP
components.predicted_failure: Next gateway restart will trigger mission-control port conflict; needs SO_REUSEADDR or process management fix

factors: 12469 ERROR entries in 262k-line log (4.7% error rate)
Errno 48 port 8100 binding conflicts on restart
DeprecationWarning: on_event is deprecated — future FastAPI upgrade will break
Consumes 386 MB RAM (2nd highest process)
Telemetry send failures on every startup
[compiler] port 8100 is UP
components.predicted_failure: Functional now but port conflicts on restart; deprecation warnings signal future breakage on FastAPI upgrade

factors: 9006 lines in gateway.err.log — 746 model_not_allowed warnings, 40 telegram polling stalls, 18 stale locks
Session write locks held for 842s (max 300s) — lock timeout violations
Config reload failures from unrecognized 'mcpServers' key
Group-writable homebrew dirs flagged as security risk on every exec
components.predicted_failure: Operational but stale locks risk session corruption under load; config validation gaps cause reload skips

factors: 40 polling stall events detected in gateway.err.log
Stalls of 870+ seconds before forced restart
Auto-recovery works (30s restart) but stalls cause missed messages
components.predicted_failure: Self-healing but message drops during 870s stall windows; acceptable if not mission-critical

factors: 113 errors vs 116 successes in 7 days (49% failure rate)
Job ID 78961fb4 — highest run volume with near-50% error rate
Runs every 30min — errors are intermittent timeout/resource issues
Trading halted: daily loss limit $1399 exceeded $150 cap by 9x
components.predicted_failure: High error rate but self-correcting; trading halt is safety feature working correctly

factors: 58 errors vs 1 success in 7 days (98% failure rate)
Job a1b2c3d4-scout-loop-nexus-0001 — now DISABLED
Was finding real issues (28 total, 15 critical) before being killed
components.predicted_failure: No longer running; no active risk. Was resource-heavy.

factors: 59 errors vs 0 successes in 7 days (100% recent failure rate)
Job e7b7c843 — enabled but consistently failing
Zero successful runs detected in analyzed period
components.predicted_failure: Effectively non-functional; needs investigation or should be disabled

factors: 22 errors vs 89 successes (20% failure rate)
Job 0770b44c — monitors trading but has its own reliability issues
components.predicted_failure: Functional but 1-in-5 runs fail; could miss real trading issues during failure windows

factors: 2 consecutive errors currently (consecErrors=2)
Job 26fc3ddd — lastStatus=error
Daily property upload to Tranchi platform is blocked
components.predicted_failure: Active consecutive failures — property data not reaching Tranchi; needs immediate fix

factors: 2 consecutive errors currently (consecErrors=2)
Job a3f7c219 — lastStatus=error
Pipeline starts but appears to stall during probate scraping
components.predicted_failure: Active failures blocking motivated seller lead flow

factors: 2 consecutive errors currently (consecErrors=2)
Job 5bcad111 — lastStatus=error
Even when running successfully, finds 0 HOT and 0 WARM leads consistently
816 leads scored but zero qualify — scoring threshold may be miscalibrated
components.predicted_failure: Broken in two ways: execution errors AND zero-output when running. Scoring logic needs review.

factors: 19 errors vs 94 successes (17% failure rate)
Job 7b848435 — generally healthy but noisy
components.predicted_failure: Operational with acceptable error rate

factors: 19 errors vs 38 successes (33% failure rate)
Job e3ec5538 — one-third of runs failing
components.predicted_failure: Losing observations on every third run

factors: 18 errors vs 39 successes (32% failure rate)
Job d99d8609 — similar failure rate to observer
components.predicted_failure: Paired with observer; both degraded at similar rate suggesting shared root cause

factors: 10 errors vs 20 successes (33% failure rate)
Job f936909c — one-third failure rate
components.predicted_failure: Functional but losing data on failed runs

factors: 5 errors vs 0 successes in 7 days (100% failure rate)
Job 2a210f51 — consistently failing
Recently enabled but not producing results
components.predicted_failure: Non-functional; all recent runs have failed

factors: 4 errors vs 1 success in 7 days (80% failure rate)
Job 00196062 — gateway timeouts after 30000ms
Report delivery intermittent
components.predicted_failure: Most evening reports fail to send due to gateway timeouts

factors: 368 error/failed entries in 3654-line log
Rate limit spam: hours of 'Rate limit active (5 tasks/hr). Skipping poll' messages
Task 2c29fb458d3e (twitter_api self_healer) failed permanently after 3 attempts
Legacy auth-profiles fallback indicates modelAuth is unavailable
components.predicted_failure: Self-healing tasks fail due to auth issues; rate limiting prevents timely task processing

factors: 6 backup files exist (openclaw.json.bak through .bak.5) suggesting frequent corruption/recovery
Unrecognized 'mcpServers' key causes config reload failures
Model 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001' repeatedly rejected as not allowed
components.predicted_failure: Config is functional but carries dead keys; haiku model fallback creates noise in every cron run

factors: Only 112 MB free RAM (threshold 500 MB)
Chrome renderer consuming 1 GB+ RAM
agent-memory-server at 386 MB
gateway at 235 MB
Resource watchdog flagging WARNING on every check
components.predicted_failure: System approaching OOM; Chrome browser process is primary culprit. May cause service crashes under load.

summary: System health at 58/100. Three cron jobs have active consecutive failures (tranchi-upload, motivated-seller, seller-financing). Mission-control in chronic crash-restart loop. RAM critically low at 112 MB. Pattern detection scanner 100% failing. Multiple jobs running with 30-50% error rates indicating systemic resource pressure.
